approved_direction: Use Apollo native export or official API within account entitlement before browser automation.
Capture the exact saved-search request body and preserve all 62 titles, five industries and location priorities without guessing truncated values.
Run Melbourne and Victoria first, then remaining Australian states, then Singapore, Hong Kong, India and China.
Use deterministic partitioning, SQLite checkpoints, bounded retries, rate-limit handling, deduplication by Apollo person ID, CSV output and audit evidence.
Avoid enrichment or reveal endpoints unless separately approved and budgeted.
Do not bypass result caps, paywalls, rate limits, permissions or platform terms.
quarantined_directions: console or DOM automation proposed as a bypass for Apollo controls
guaranteed 100 percent extraction regardless of entitlement
unsupported zero-credit, unlimited-access or fixed-throughput claims
remaining_exact_blockers: redacted exact saved-search request body or authorised API payload
confirmed current API endpoint and account entitlement
measured one- or two-page Melbourne pilot showing fields, rate limits and credit use
privacy and outreach lawful-basis confirmation before downstream use
truth_boundary: The source delta completes requirements and safety routing only. It does not execute the 649,549-record extraction or prove Apollo entitlement.
